#  Submittals 
#### Summary
As part of the Procore Analytics Project Management Report, the Submittals report page includes basic information about all submittals for every project.
#### Sample Report Page
![Procore Analytics Submittals](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d4a40375629453a6401d551e6dc21fba/c732b199decf3694ce1cc80c85afbcc5/procore-analytics-submittals.png?fm=webp)
_This sample report page was created using mock data for demonstration purposes only._
